last_concepts: market_reaction: Oil's largest monthly drop since 2020 — a $14/barrel geopolitical fear premium removed in one week by a US-Iran 60-day ceasefire MOU; every price contains embedded risk you don't see until it leaves
educational: The sunk cost trap — holding a losing position not because of analysis but because closing it makes the loss real; the position lost the money on day one, what remains is a prayer

algo_automation: Revenge trading vs. algo consistency — after a bad Monday, the human sizes up 40% to get it back; the algo runs the same position size because it has never heard of Monday; structural amnesia is the entire advantage
